payload.answer: The new fact appears to be a potential supersession of the existing job fact: the existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. This suggests a temporal employment update rather than a simple duplicate.
citations: Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman
New memory: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72
